failure_before_amendment: The second invocation stopped while constructing the fixed proxy learner because the FARE-compatible scikit-learn build does not accept class_weight in HistGradientBoostingClassifier. No FARE tree was fit and no FARE representation or outcome was observed.
reason: Compatibility-only replacement of class_weight='balanced' by the equivalent per-example balanced sample weights n/(2 n_s). The proxy model, data, split, features, hyperparameters, seed, candidate grid, and release contracts are unchanged.
